title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 478.577 - Circuit No. 46, number of judges — election, when
text:
478.577.  Circuit No. 46, number of judges — election, when. — Beginning January 1, 2017, there shall be one circuit judge in the forty-sixth judicial circuit who shall be elected in 2016 for a two-year term and thereafter in 2018 for a full six-year term.
(L. 2016 S.B. 585)
Effective 2-18-16
